title: n8n not accessible due to local loopback address
symptom: When trying to access n8n via the server's IP address, the connection fails with a network error. The service is only reachable from the host machine.
not_this_if: Accessing n8n from the host machine directly
root_cause: The n8n service is bound to the local loopback address (127.0.0.1), which means it is not accessible from external IP addresses. This configuration prevents external access to the n8n service.
fix_steps: Change the n8n service port mapping from '127.0.0.1:5678:5678' to '5678:5678' in the docker-compose.yml file.
Restart the Docker containers using 'docker-compose up -d'.
agent_instruction: Update the n8n port mapping in the docker-compose file to allow external access.
